actions.reason: Inconsistent country code formats (US, us, USA)
actions.benefit: Ensure consistent parsing and storage of geographical locations
Enforce a standard country name format for consistency

actions.reason: Inconsistent date formats (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD, MM/DD/YYYY, DD MMM YYYY)
actions.benefit: Ensure consistent parsing and storage of dates
Ensure consistent sorting and filtering by date
Enable case-sensitive operations (e.g., sorting or filtering)
Enable boolean operations and consistency in product status

cross_file_plan.reason: Both files contain customer information, which may lead to duplicate records if not properly merged or deduplicated.
cross_file_plan.benefit: Ensure unique customer records and prevent data redundancy

cross_file_plan.reason: Both files contain order information, which may require alignment of column names or formats for consistent analysis.
cross_file_plan.benefit: Enable seamless integration and analysis of orders across both datasets
